strategy.targetMarket: United States and global English-speaking developers/operators
strategy.source: Existing published q/blog/cluster graph and top q optimization list
notes: This file is a launch queue, not published content.
The site should prioritize problem-first English pages before generic AI tool introductions.
Use the custom domain canonical base when publishing: https://ai.aporet.com
Search Console and Bing should receive only reviewed URLs, not the full queue at once.

lanes.reason: Vercel and Next.js deployment errors are urgent problem searches with clear solutions.
englishQueries: how to fix codex vercel deployment
how to fix dev works build fails
how to fix env variable missing fix
how to fix gemini api nextjs guide
how to fix llm api integration deployment checklist

lanes.reason: Codex setup, code review, and project automation queries match the site's existing topical authority.
englishQueries: how to fix codex bugfix rollback record
how to fix claude code low risk freelance jobs
how to fix codex css spacing responsive
how to fix codex project start checklist
how to fix codex vs claude code beginner

lanes.reason: Node.js, npm, TypeScript, module, and build errors are stable evergreen search demand.
englishQueries: how to fix codex npm install errors
how to fix codex windows install failed
how to fix dependency conflict fix
how to fix eslint error should not disable
how to fix module not found debug

lanes.reason: Agent deployment, tool-calling, and workflow failures are concrete US/global builder searches.
englishQueries: how to fix agent observability logging guide
how to fix agent production deployment checklist
how to fix agent tool calling beginner guide
how to fix agent tool permission safety guide
how to fix dify workflow error handling guide

lanes.reason: CI failures, workflow errors, and repository automation issues are easy to diagnose from exact queries.
englishQueries: how to fix failed to push some refs fix
how to fix git authentication failed fix
how to fix github actions build log debug
how to fix package lock conflict fix
how to fix github command cheatsheet beginner

lanes.reason: API key, quota, rate limit, and authentication failures are commercially valuable troubleshooting traffic.
englishQueries: how to fix claude api rate limit debug guide
how to fix gemini api rate limit debug guide
how to fix llm api rate limit retry guide

lanes.reason: RAG memory and retrieval problems create high-intent implementation searches.
